metadata.description: Stop clicking Allow on every ls | grep foo. Known commands approved instantly from your allow/deny lists. Unknown commands evaluated by AI — deny list enforced, injection-resistant prompts, uncertain decisions kicked back to you. Requires: shfmt, jq (brew install shfmt jq). See github.com/froggeric/claude-smart-approval for security notices.

plugins.name: smart-approval
plugins.description: Stop clicking Allow on every ls | grep foo. Known commands approved instantly from your allow/deny lists. Unknown commands evaluated by AI with safety-first design. See github.com/froggeric/claude-smart-approval for security notices.
